nodes.name: Cercococcyx
nodes.summary: Cercococcyx（Cercococcyx）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联3种鸟类，如Dusky long-tailed cuckoo、Olive long-tailed cuckoo、Barred long-tailed cuckoo。

nodes.name: 杜鹃科
nodes.summary: 杜鹃科（Cuculidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联147种鸟类，如圭拉鹃、Greater ani、滑嘴犀鵑等147种鸟类。

nodes.name: Dusky long-tailed cuckoo
nodes.summary: Dusky long-tailed cuckoo（Cercococcyx mechowi）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Dusky long-tailed cuckoo。

nodes.name: Barred long-tailed cuckoo
nodes.summary: Barred long-tailed cuckoo（Cercococcyx montanus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Barred long-tailed cuckoo。

nodes.name: Olive long-tailed cuckoo
nodes.summary: Olive long-tailed cuckoo（Cercococcyx olivinus）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Olive long-tailed cuckoo。
